subject: Update the logs folder to be AAI-SS

Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1

so I've made a "mistake" and all review are being tested by two deployments:
 
* one (gitlab orange) using rancher installing k8s 1.8.10 and helm 2.9.1
* the other (gitlab orange 2) using kubespray installing k8s  1.12.3 and helm 2.9.1

as AAI is using readiness:2.0.2, the first one cannot succeed but the second one has so it's OK.
Change has been successfully merged by James MacNider
